name: remark (slides)

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing a slide runtime when you need the lightest in-browser Markdown presentation with speaker notes and a cloned presenter view, because native implementations fail at scaling, incremental reveals, and presenter-state synchronization; not for a scrolling article or visual slide editor.
en.why_valuable: AI can only split Markdown into static div elements by default; it cannot provide cross-resolution scaling, incremental content, speaker notes, and dual-window presenter mode. remark supplies a complete presentation runtime from one source string.

data_in.note: remark.create reads the source string and takes over the current document; upstream has no npm package, and picks has no version that can be pinned.

schema.markdown: string -- remark source; a standalone --- starts a new slide, a standalone -- creates an incremental step, and content after ??? is the current slide's speaker notes

spec.note: remark takes over the complete document viewport and scales itself; the host iframe should have an explicit height of 600px. vh/percentage height is prohibited. It has no locally scoped mount root that can be specified safely.

when_to_use: 需要最轻的浏览器内 Markdown 演示、讲者备注与克隆讲者视图时用它而非手写幻灯运行时,因为原生手写在缩放、增量呈现和讲者状态同步上失败;非做滚动文章或可视化幻灯编辑器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能把 Markdown 切成静态 div,做不到跨分辨率缩放、增量内容、讲者备注与双窗口讲者模式;remark 用单一 source 字符串提供完整演示运行时。

data_in._why_no_example: remark Markdown 是 AI 原生记法;schema 钉死分页、增量与备注分隔符即可,无需 minimal example。
data_in.note: remark.create 读取 source 字符串并接管当前 document;上游无 npm 包,picks 也没有可钉版本。

schema.markdown: string —— remark source;独占一行的 --- 分页,独占一行的 -- 建立增量步,??? 后是当前页讲者备注

spec.note: remark 接管完整文档视口并自行缩放;宿主 iframe 应显式给 600px 高,禁止 vh/百分比高。它没有可安全指定的局部 mount 根。

boot.widget: unsupported:remark.create 接管 document、注入全局样式并绑定窗口级导航,没有 shadowRoot mount 参数

carriers.widget: unsupported:document 全局接管与 shadow 零足迹要求冲突
carriers.codex: conditional:隔离 iframe 可承载 UMD 全局与讲者窗口;官方 remark-latest.min.js 是可变 URL,上游没有可核对的固定发布文件

isolation.evidence: remark.create() takes over the entire document: injects its presentation stylesheet into document.head, builds slide-container DOM in document.body, and binds window-level keyboard navigation + hashchange + localStorage-based presenter-view sync with no scoped teardown; there is no shadowRoot mount parameter. Bundle confirms a global remark UMD (create:function). Catalog correctly marks the widget carrier 'unsupported'.
